items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Bitcoin Owner Claims Claude AI Cracked Lost Wallet Password, Netting $400K in BTC
items.summary: A viral thread on X drew millions of views as a user claimed Claude AI helped recover a lost Bitcoin wallet.

items.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong gets behind CLARITY Act ahead of Thursday markup
items.summary: Armstrong said the bill is "closer than ever" to advancing in the US Congress after months of negotiations between the crypto industry and banks.

items.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh to lead Federal Reserve
items.summary: The US Senate voted largely along party lines to confirm Kevin Warsh to lead the Fed’s Board of Governors, despite many Democrats’ concerns about the central bank’s independence.

items.title: Bitcoin Rally Cut Short as Profit-Taking Rises, US Demand Falls: CryptoQuant
items.summary: Bitcoin's recent rally stalled at a critical level, putting the top crypto asset in a position that has previously led to major downturns.

items.title: Myriad Adopts Chainlink as Official Oracle Platform to Power New Crypto Prediction Markets
items.summary: Chainlink Runtime Environment enables Myriad to deploy a new range of prediction markets with immediate settlement.

items.title: Whale shorts $70M in crypto and tech: Should Bitcoin traders worry?
items.summary: Despite short-term bearish bets from a successful Hyperliquid whale, a growing US Fed balance sheet and rising inflation support Bitcoin in the long term.

items.title: Crypto-Friendly Kevin Warsh Confirmed as Fed Chair to Replace Jerome Powell
items.summary: Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump's pick to lead the Federal Reserve, was confirmed as its new chair Wednesday to replace Jerome Powell.

items.title: Senators File Clarity Act Amendments on DeFi, Trump Family, and Jeffrey Epstein
items.summary: The Senate Banking Committee will vote tomorrow on the new additions to the crypto bill, before deciding whether to refer it to the Senate floor.

items.title: Polymarket's monthly volume declines for first time since August
items.summary: Prediction markets trading volume had been tracking monthly gains as the sector gains popularity among short-term traders, but competition is also increasing.

items.title: Ethereum app builder Consensys has delayed its potential IPO until fall
items.summary: The MetaMask wallet builder had reportedly engaged bankers from JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs to lead the process.

items.title: Bitcoin traders expect ‘fast move’ to $90K following CLARITY Act vote
items.summary: Bitcoin traders eye a possible move higher as short-term selling pressure fades and the CLARITY Act vote boosts crypto market focus.

items.title: Price predictions 5/13: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
items.summary: Bitcoin’s pullback is expected to find support near $79,000, but every recovery attempt is likely to be sold into.

items.title: Societe Generale deploys stablecoins on Canton for tokenized finance
items.summary: France's SocGen plans to use its EURCV and USDCV stablecoins for tokenized collateral, repo financing and institutional settlement activity on the Canton blockchain network.

items.title: US government asks for $1M forfeiture from ex-Celsius exec ahead of sentencing
items.summary: Former Celsius chief revenue officer Roni Cohen-Pavon, scheduled to be sentenced on Thursday after a guilty plea, agreed to a judgment of $1 million that he obtained as a result of his crimes.

items.title: Bitcoin Firm Metaplanet Posts $725 Million Loss, Delays Preferred Share Offerings
items.summary: Metaplanet CEO Simon Gerovich acknowledged that preferred shares unveiled in November have yet to be issued.

items.title: UK Treasury: Digital Assets Have Potential for 'Complete Transformation' of Markets
items.summary: The Economic Secretary to the Treasury highlighted an upcoming consultation on payments encompassing digital assets and AI agents.

items.title: 'Lord of the Rings' Director Peter Jackson Says AI Is 'Just a Special Effect'
items.summary: Peter Jackson says Hollywood’s fears around AI could hurt recognition for performance-capture acting, as debates about how the technology will reshape the movie industry grow.

items.title: How Figure is Democratizing Crypto-as-Collateral for Mainstream Users
items.summary: As digital assets make inroads into the mainstream, crypto lender Figure is helping to turn them into viable collateral for credit.

items.title: Fidelity International launches Moody’s-rated tokenized fund on Chainlink
items.summary: The Bermuda-based asset manager launched a tokenized liquidity fund using Chainlink and Sygnum infrastructure, with JPMorgan providing daily NAV data for pricing.

items.title: The Protocol: Solana’s ‘Alpenglow’ upgrade is live for testing
items.summary: Also: LayerZero apology, Ronin layer-2 transition and ‘Clear Signing’

items.title: Tea Protocol announces June 4 mainnet launch and TGE on Aerodrome to secure open-source development in the AI era
items.summary: This quarter, AI started writing its own exploits. Tea is shipping the trust layer underneath it. Code Is Abundant. Trust Is Not.

items.title: Metaplanet delays preferred share listing amid challenging Japanese market structure
items.summary: CEO Simon Gerovich says regulatory and infrastructure challenges are slowing the launch of Metaplanet's perpetual preferred share.

items.title: UK parliament to probe Nigel Farage’s $6.8 million donation from crypto billionaire
items.summary: If found guilty of violating the Parliamentary code of conduct, the Reform UK party leader could be suspended from the House of Commons.

items.title: Charles Schwab Begins Offering Bitcoin, Ethereum Trading to US Users
items.summary: Charles Schwab started allowing select users to trade Bitcoin and Ethereum directly alongside their other investments.

items.title: Traders say Ethereum ready for a 'strong move' after ETH price taps $2.3K
items.summary: Market analysts eye fresh Ethereum upside, fueled by JPMorgan and BlackRock tokenized fund moves plus looming CLARITY Act catalyst.

items.title: Bitcoin buyers with long-term 'conviction' surges 300% with most recent buyers sitting on profits
items.summary: Bitcoin held by so-called conviction buyers has surged to nearly 4 million BTC, a roughly 300% increase since late 2025.

items.title: Bank of England Treating Stablecoins as 'New Form of Money', Says Exec
items.summary: The U.K.’s central bank is “not picking winners” in the debate over tokenized deposits and stablecoins, Sasha Mills said Wednesday.

items.title: Bitcoin price targets $79K as US PPI inflation hits highest since 2022
items.summary: Bitcoin slipped further below the $80,000 mark as US PPI data compounded the inflation problem from the US-Iran war and associated high oil prices.

items.title: Crypto Long & Short: Bitcoin vs. gold: 26% relative undervaluation
items.summary: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Dovile Silenskyte provides an alternative to the “bitcoin as a risk asset” narrative. Then, Joshua de Vos shares insights and analysis on global exchanges.

items.title: Telecom giant KDDI to acquire 14.9% stake in Coincheck Group in $65 million deal
items.summary: The companies signed a business alliance for revenue sharing, referral fees and customer referrals to expand crypto access in Japan.

items.title: Clarity Act amendments would remake key parts of crypto bill but have doubtful future
items.summary: The U.S. crypto market structure bill is being targeted with dozens of amendments aiming to change or add to the text as its Senate hearing approaches.

items.title: Animoca-backed NUVA connects Figure's $19 billion of tokenized assets to Ethereum
items.summary: The protocol, led by veteran BNY executive Anthony Moro, aims to connect real-world assets with DeFi markets, starting with home equity lines of credit and Treasuries.

items.title: Brickken and Magma partner to deliver Net Asset Value (NAV) oracle for tokenized real estate
items.summary: Built on Magma's Digital Twin Token (DTT) and Brickken's institutional tokenization infrastructure to close the data gap that has held tokenized real estate back.

items.title: Paybis secures MiCA, payment licenses in Latvia for EU crypto expansion
items.summary: Paybis has secured both a MiCA crypto licence and a PSD2 payment institution licence from Latvia’s central bank, becoming the first company in the country to hold both simultaneously.

items.title: Half of AI Health Advice Is Wrong—And Seems Just Right
items.summary: A peer-reviewed audit in BMJ Open found that nearly 50% of health responses from five major AI chatbots were problematic, with fabricated sources and confident delivery.

items.title: Crypto wallet provider Ledger puts U.S. IPO plans on hold due to market conditions
items.summary: The French crypto security firm, which is said to have explored a potential $4 billion U.S. listing, is reassessing its public market plans as volatile conditions weigh on investor appetite for crypto IPOs.

items.title: Quantum Computing Threat 'Mostly a Coordination Issue' for Bitcoin: Fireblocks CEO
items.summary: Michael Shaulov argued that changing to a post-quantum cryptographic signature scheme is “not a technical challenge” for Bitcoin.

items.title: It’s time for clarity for America’s digital asset markets
items.summary: Recent polls have shown that registered voters want America to set the rules for global finance, reinforcing why the Senate must act now, explains Smith.

items.summary: UK Reform Party leader Nigel Farage is reportedly facing a probe over an undeclared donation from crypto billionaire Christopher Harborne that he received before becoming an MP in 2024.

items.title: Anthropic, OpenAI tokens plunge as AI firms say pre-IPO share transfers are invalid
items.summary: Tokens on Solana that claim to track the private-market valuations of Anthropic and OpenAI dropped sharply this week after both AI companies warned that the structures used to back the tokens may be invalid.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: SUI drops 3.2% as index trades lower
items.summary: Bittensor (TAO), down 2.7% from Tuesday, joined Sui (SUI) as an underperformer.

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin dips below $80,000 as producer price inflation surges to 6%
items.summary: U.S. PPI surged well above forecasts in April, reviving concerns that rising oil prices and Iran-related supply risks may feed another inflation wave.

items.title: Metaplanet Q1 profit jumps, but Bitcoin losses hit bottom line
items.summary: Metaplanet posted strong Q1 operating income driven by Bitcoin options revenue, but swung to a $728 million loss as BTC price declines triggered valuation markdowns.

items.title: Bitcoin to $100K in Q2? Strategy’s STRC unlocks potential to buy 3K BTC in two days
items.summary: Strategy’s potential 3,127 BTC buy this week, alongside falling stablecoin dominance, suggests more capital may enter the Bitcoin market.

items.title: The 2020 signal returns: Why the copper-to-gold breakout could point to bitcoin breakout
items.summary: The ratio has climbed above its 200-day moving average for the first time meaningfully since September 2020, a move that has historically preceded major bitcoin rallies.

items.title: Coinbase-backed x402 adds batch settlement for AI agent payments
items.summary: Coinbase-backed x402 adds batch settlement, letting AI agents authorize many small payments offchain before settling them later onchain.

items.title: Tokenized Treasuries hit $15 billion as bitcoin stalls, Fed rate-rise concerns build
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for May 13, 2026

items.title: Arkham maps Iran central bank wallets after $344M USDT freeze
items.summary: Arkham’s new map links OFAC‑sanctioned Tron wallets to Iran’s central bank, putting Tehran’s alleged onchain reserves and counterparties in full public view.

items.title: Morning Minute: CPI Comes In Hot; Stocks, Crypto Shrug
items.summary: Hot CPI didn't stall markets for long, while the Clarity Act has already received 100 amendments ahead of tomorrow's markup.

items.summary: Bitcoin held steady before President Donald Trump's with his Chinese counterpart, Xi Jinping.

items.summary: An initial group of clients can now trade bitcoin and ether on the Schwab Crypto platform.

items.summary: CEO Yoni Assia says he’s bullish on crypto and expects to see it back to all-time highs this year even as crypto derivatives trading on eToro dropped.
